allowlist.reason: risk action execution bridges project risk actions with optional evidence exception records after explicit intent permission and project-scope checks
api.data write allowlist expands business-configured manual fields through metadata reads before user-scoped writes
activity scheduling needs ir.model metadata lookup after record write access is checked on the target business record
activity updates need ir.model metadata lookup before operating on user-visible mail.activity records
execute_button resolves server actions and follow-up activity metadata under explicit_check path before executing model-scoped actions
release operator writes platform release and product policy governance records behind explicit operator intents
search favorite writes ir.filters and regenerates search config through a user-scoped favorite policy
usage counters are append-only telemetry and require stable cross-role write path
